cryptic_eye.title: Craft the Cryptic Eye (center: Chaotic Hexahedron + spawner blade + experience nuggets + dungeon materials)

place_cryptic.title: Place the Cryptic Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: A lock placed in a doorway. Who was it keeping out?

description: The Cryptic Eye slots into the End Portal frame.
Eleven eyes placed (if all previous eyes collected).
The Cryptic civilization built their inheritance as a series of puzzles.
Everything they knew was hidden inside a structure designed to resist being known.
It was elegant and it was catastrophic:
when their civilization fell, no one could read the archive.
The Cryptic Eye is their most honest artifact.
It is a lock. It does not claim to be anything else.
You are placing it in the frame alongside memory, wounds, cold, calculation.
The portal is assembling itself from everything that came before you.
